cross_site.note: Site comparison is not meaningful — only Mohenjo-daro is present. This will become informative once Harappa / Dholavira / Lothal data are ingested.

latent_classes.interpretation: Classes are derived from positional behavior only (start/end/internal rates). These are candidate structural classes, NOT phoneme assignments. TERMINAL_STRONG signs are candidates for morpheme-final markers. INITIAL_STRONG signs are candidates for title/initial determinatives.

INITIAL_SLOT.description: Opening sign/signs — candidate title or determinative

MEDIAL_SLOT.description: Internal signs — candidate root or modifier

TERMINAL_SLOT.description: Final sign/signs — candidate suffix or formula closure

HAPAX_SLOT.description: Signs appearing once only — high uncertainty
